heading: Repealed. ,Feb. 28, 1933, ch. 131, § 147 Stat. 1349
label: 595, 596 Repealed. ,Feb. 28, 1933, ch. 131, § 147 Stat. 1349
notes: Sections, R.S. §§ 2461, 2462, penalized cutting and provided for forfeiture of vessels carrying away timber on lands reserved or purchased to supply timber for Navy.
